variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16573 Air Filter
variants.description: The HiFi Filter SA 16573 air filter is designed to provide superior filtration and enhance the performance of your machinery. Constructed with premium materials, this air filter effectively captures dust, dirt, and other airborne contaminants, ensuring that your engine remains clean and operates efficiently. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16573 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining optimal engine health and performance. By ordering with FilterFinder you benefit from our 1-year manufacturer warranty, as well as no quibble 45-day returns and a full inspection of the parts by our engineers, making sure you get both peace of mind and exceptional value for your investment.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 125.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 71.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 12.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 245.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 234.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 210.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P500970 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16573
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P500970 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16573
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P500970 Air Filter, Primary Round is crafted to provide outstanding engine protection by filtering out dust, dirt, and debris before they reach the combustion chamber. Its round design maximizes airflow while maintaining exceptional filtration efficiency, supporting better fuel economy and engine performance. Perfect for trucks, heavy machinery, and industrial equipment, this filter is built to withstand harsh conditions. Its durable construction extends service intervals, reducing maintenance frequency and ensuring long-lasting engine health.
